# 🍁 Synthetic Tech Internships Fixture

Mirrors the structure of negarprh/Canadian-Tech-Internships-2026 (confirmed
2026-07-07): badge-wrapped apply links, `↳` continuation rows, multi-location
cells, and non-table prose around the table. All rows are synthetic.

📌 **How this list works**
- Internships are sorted by their **original posting date**

| Not | A | Jobs | Table |
|-----|---|------|-------|
| this | table | is | ignored |
